items.title: Two salon tables remain for the late seating.
items.body: Counter requests are currently on waitlist, but the later salon block remains open for pairs and small parties.

items.title: The shorter pairing now closes with a drier final glass.
items.body: Guests asking for the lighter finish can move through the alternate pairing without losing the final cacao course.

items.title: Thursday salon requests are being confirmed in order of arrival.
items.body: The darker salon edge remains the best fit for anniversaries, quiet launches, and small private nights.
